_comment: PUBLIC-SCREEN CHANNELS (docs/cinema.md Phase 5). A screen tunes the most specific matching row: faction beats state beats the open feed. categories = what it may pull off the media manifest. A new channel = a ROW (ProtoPublicScreen.ensure_channels folds additively; the open_air floor lives in code). Rows flagged "tv": true are the SAFEHOUSE TV's channel lineup (ProtoPublicScreen.tv_channels()) — tune() (ambient wall screens) skips them so they never leak onto a bar TV by accident.

channels._note: the occupier's propaganda loop — clips only, wherever the Faith Bloc holds
the market screen's mixed feed for the home state

channels.name: 48 STARS
channels._note: the safehouse TV's movie channel — features off the manifest

channels.name: FREEWAVE TV
channels._note: music videos + clips — the TV side of the FREEWAVE name (radio has its own dial)

channels.name: THE LOT
channels._note: trailers + clips — the drive-in's channel, brought home

channels.name: EBS — EMERGENCY BROADCAST
channels._note: no categories — pulls the newsroom's queued tv bulletin instead (see ProtoNewsroom); STAND BY card when the queue is quiet
